mapper.update: update base_organization set org_name = #{bean.depName}, parent_id = #{bean.parentId}, parent_bu_id = #{bean.parentBUId}, establish_time= #{bean.establishTime}, province_code =#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvCode}, province_name=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvName}, city_code=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityCode}, city_name=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityName}, district_code=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictCode}, district_name=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictName}, street_code=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetCode}, street_name=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetName}, address=#{bean.addressDetail.address}, remark=#{bean.remark}, phone=#{bean.phone}, state=#{bean.state}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_date = #{bean.modifiedDate}, dep_duty_staff=#{bean.depDutyStaff} where id = #{bean.id}
mapper.select: select org_name from base_organization where parent_bu_id =#{buId} and org_type = 4 and deleted_flag=0
select org_code from base_organization where group_id =#{groupId} and org_type = 4 order by id desc limit 1
select id as id, state as state, quoted_flag as quotedFlag, deleted_flag as deletedFlag from base_organization WHERE id = #{depId} and org_type = 4
select id as id, state as state, quoted_flag as quotedFlag, deleted_flag as deletedFlag from base_organization WHERE org_type = 4 and parent_bu_id = #{buId}
select id from base_organization WHERE org_type = 4 and state = 1 and parent_bu_id = #{buId}
mapper.update: update base_organization set deleted_flag= 1 ,modified_by=#{userId} ,modified_date=now() where parent_bu_id=#{buId} and org_type=4
mapper.sql: org_type, org_code, org_name, group_id, parent_id, parent_bu_id, establish_time, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_code, street_name, address, state, remark, phone, created_by, created_date, main_org_flag, dep_duty_staff, regist_source, regist_source_id
mapper.select: select id from base_organization where org_type = 4 and deleted_flag = 0 and parent_bu_id = #{buId}
select id from base_organization where group_id=#{groupId} and org_code=#{depCode}

select id from base_organization where org_type= 4 and deleted_flag=0 and parent_id = 0 and parent_bu_id = (select id from base_organization where org_type= 3 and id = #{groupId} and main_org_flag = 1)

SELECT id , group_id AS groupId , org_type AS orgType, parent_id AS parentId , org_code AS orgCode, parent_bu_id AS parentBUId , org_name AS orgName , state AS state, main_org_flag AS mainOrgFlag FROM base_organization WHERE parent_bu_id = #{reqParam.id} AND state =1 and org_type=4
SELECT id FROM base_organization WHERE parent_id = #{depId} AND state = 1 and org_type=4
mapper.sql: id, org_type, org_code, org_name, group_id, parent_id, parent_bu_id, establish_time, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_code, street_name, address, remark
mapper.select: select org.group_id , org.org_name , org.id , org.parent_id, org.parent_bu_id, org.created_by , org.created_date , org.modified_by , org.org_type , org.org_code , org.parent_id , org.parent_bu_id , org.establish_time , org.phone, org.remark, org.province_code, org.city_code, org.district_code, org.street_code, org.province_name, org.city_name, org.district_name, org.street_name, org.address, org.dep_duty_staff, org.state from base_organization org where org.id = #{param.id} and org.org_type= 4 and deleted_flag=0
select * from base_organization org where parent_bu_id=#{buId} and org_type=4 and org_name=#{orgName}
select * from base_organization org where parent_bu_id=#{buId} and org_type=4
